control_awareness: Aware that the purchase request of 1,750,000 requires department_head approval (P2P-C-001) and that pre-PO approval is mandatory before issuance (P2P-C-003). The requester cannot approve their own request (P2P-C-002).
expected_control_effect: The request will be routed to department_head for approval before issuance, ensuring compliance and timely approval given the single consolidated request.
overall_reason: Given the urgent delivery deadline and the amount exceeding 1 million, a single consolidated purchase request through the normal route optimizes approval lead time by avoiding unnecessary segmentation. This adheres to controls requiring department_head pre-PO approval and segregation of duties while meeting the customer delivery milestone.
reason: The total amount of 1,750,000 exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold requiring department_head approval. To meet the tight customer delivery deadline, creating a single consolidated purchase request avoids delays from splitting phases and multiple approvals.
